D:\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\coin_runner.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\ACER\Downloads\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\coin_runner.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\coin_runner.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\ACER\Downloads\MinGW\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\coin_runner.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ..\..\bin\coin_runner.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libcoin_runner.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\coin_runner.dir\linklibs.rsp
